experiences.summary: Led FMCW radar R&D for ultra-short-range operator detection, combining hardware testing, algorithm design, and stakeholder communication to assess integration feasibility in industrial vehicles.
highlights: Spearheaded an 11-week FMCW radar feasibility investigation for operator detection in confined industrial vehicle cabins.
Characterized three sensor architectures and validated real-world behavior against datasheets and SDK reference implementations.
Engineered a custom Python analysis pipeline to parse raw UART hexdumps and replay 3D point-cloud data for diagnostics.
Designed a three-state finite state machine and classification layer to convert noisy point clouds into occupancy outcomes.
Presented findings to 50+ stakeholders, tailoring technical depth for mentors, engineers, and executive decision-makers.
